PostToolUse.description: Stack-aware type/compile check after editing source files

Stop.description: Quality gate: stack-aware type check + tests + unchecked items. Exit 2 blocks stop. 3-attempt max prevents session bricking.

hooks.prompt: Context compaction is about to fire. Commit any uncommitted work now. State saved to .pilot/state.json. After compaction, read .pilot/current-feature.md and .pilot/handoff.md to resume.

PreCompact.description: Save state to disk before compaction destroys conversation context

SessionStart.description: Restore context from disk after /clear or compaction
